exercises.title: Protocol Stack Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate the quantum protocol stack with layer interactions.
tasks: Generate stack trace for sample request
exercises.expectedOutput: Protocol stack simulation with message flow
hints: Each layer provides services to layer above
Classical signals flow with quantum operations
Use abstract classes for layer interfaces

exercises.title: Node Type Designer
exercises.description: Design and compare different node types for various roles.
tasks: Define capability profiles for each node type
Determine optimal node type for given requirements
exercises.expectedOutput: Node type design and selection tool
hints: End nodes need compute, repeaters need memory

exercises.title: Network Topology Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze quantum network topologies for performance.
exercises.expectedOutput: Network topology analysis and comparison tool
hints: Path fidelity degrades with each hop
Consider both fiber and satellite links

exercises.title: Classical-Quantum Integration Planner
exercises.description: Plan the integration of classical and quantum planes.
hints: Consider both control and data planes
